# MYCURE

> MYCURE is a clinic management system and electronic medical
> records (EMR) platform for clinics, multi-specialty groups,
> corporate clinics, diagnostic centers, and aesthetic clinics.
> Used by healthcare organizations in the Philippines and
> internationally. Operated by TOPSI Inc. Founded 2016.

## Core product pages

- [Clinics](https://mycure.md/clinics): All-in-one clinic management
  for outpatient practices — scheduling, billing, EMR, telehealth.
- [Corporate](https://mycure.md/corporate): Corporate clinic and
  occupational health management for organizations with on-site
  health programs.
- [Telehealth](https://mycure.md/telehealth): Virtual consultations
  with encrypted video and integrated EMR.
- [Booking](https://mycure.md/booking): Online appointment scheduling
  with patient self-service.
- [Diagnostics](https://mycure.md/diagnostics): Laboratory and
  imaging center workflow management.
- [Mobile Labs](https://mycure.md/mobile-labs): On-site diagnostic
  services with location-based registration.
- [Skin & Aesthetics](https://mycure.md/skin): MYCURE Beauty for
  dermatology and aesthetic clinics with before/after photo
  management.
- [Syncbase Technology](https://mycure.md/syncbase-technology):
  MYCURE's offline-first synchronization architecture.

## Operating details

- Country: Philippines
- Founded: 2016
- Founder: Dale Dennis David
- Operating organization: TOPSI Inc.
- Sitemap: https://mycure.md/sitemap.xml
